overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character walks along neon-lit sidewalks, crosses busy multi-lane streets, and navigates through a futuristic urban environment with elevated highways and massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban sidewalk beneath elevated transit highway

events.description: approaching intersection and stopping at curb to wait for passing vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right sidewalk with a companion, approaching a busy intersection with neon billboards

notable_agents.action: companion character walking alongside ego, matching pace and direction

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track structure running above the street with support pillars
large illuminated billboard advertising cola with bright red and white neon colors
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk next to concrete barriers
wide concrete pedestrian walkway with distinctive red painted curb
tall modern street lamp with overhead lighting illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic city sidewalk at night, with an elevated transit structure overhead and massive neon billboards illuminating the right side. Palm trees line the left side of the walkway as the character and a companion approach a busy intersection.

events.description: stepping off the curb and beginning to cross the multi-lane street
reaching the opposite sidewalk after navigating through moving traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy multi-lane avenue with a companion, weaving between moving vehicles including a silver sedan

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection, passing in front of the crossing pedestrians

entered.detail: painted white stripes with red borders marking the pedestrian crossing area
vertical pole with traffic signals and illuminated pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the multi-lane street using a marked crosswalk, navigating between moving vehicles. The elevated transit structure remains visible overhead while traffic flows around the crossing pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with dense neon advertising

events.description: transitioning to the opposite sidewalk with new building facades and advertisements visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the left sidewalk, passing various commercial buildings covered in neon advertisements

entered.detail: tall building covered with multiple illuminated windows and structural details
building facade covered with various glowing commercial signs and digital billboards

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk through a dense commercial district, with tall buildings covered in neon advertisements on the left and the elevated transit structure now closer overhead. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: second pedestrian crosswalk across busy avenue

events.description: entering the crosswalk to cross the street again, waiting for vehicles to pass
continuing across the crosswalk as traffic clears and approaching the opposite curb

agents.ego_description: crossing the street a second time with the companion, moving from the left sidewalk toward the right side of the avenue

notable_agents.action: black car with headlights on driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character crosses another busy street via a marked crosswalk, navigating through moderate traffic with a companion. Vehicles pass by with headlights illuminating the wet road surface as they complete the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban corridor as the character navigates a series of busy intersections in a futuristic city. It begins on a sidewalk lined with palm trees and massive billboards under an elevated transit structure, moving steadily toward a bustling crossing. As the character steps into the multi-lane street, the camera follows them through the flow of traffic before transitioning onto the opposite sidewalk, where the environment shifts into a denser commercial district with wet pavement reflecting the surrounding advertisements. The scene then expands as the character approaches another marked crosswalk, weaving through headlights and moderate traffic. Finally, the movement concludes as they complete the second crossing, with the glow of the city and the overhead transit lines framing their path.
